name: 寻龙分金模拟器
detailed_description:
Dragon Hunting

Mountains are regarded as dragons. Observe the trend and shape of the mountains. Locate the ancestral mountain as the starting point and see if the mountains have undulations and turns, forming a continuous trend. If the mountains wind and twist, with branches and convergences, it is believed that there might be a good feng shui layout, and ancient tombs are located where the dragon energy gathers.





Examine the sand.

The small hills or highlands around the main mountain range. Observe the position, shape and height of the sand. If the sand mountains are arranged in an orderly manner and encircle the main mountain, it is usually considered good feng shui. On both sides of the main mountain range, there are symmetrical sand mountains on the left and right, like guards. This layout may suggest that the feng shui here is good and there might be a cave.





Watching Water

Water holds significant importance in Feng Shui. The direction and form of water flow are key points. Water should meander and not flow in a straight line. If a river flows in a circular or embracing pattern around a mountain, it is considered an auspicious sign. Some rivers wind slowly around an area, forming a semi-circle or arc. In the concept of Feng Shui, the area surrounded by water is regarded as a prime location.





Pressure point striking

Determine specific acupuncture points, that is, the possible exact location of the ancient tomb. By integrating factors such as dragons and water, search for the acupuncture point. Generally, it is located at the intersection of mountains and waterways, the concave parts of mountains, or the raised areas in flatlands, etc.





Attention

The game does not contain any elements such as stealing precious cultural relics or destroying them. The game is only for reference, learning, entertainment and other scenarios. Do not imitate it in real life!
